label: ElevenLabs
description: Generate and clone lifelike AI voices using ElevenLabs' speech synthesis API.

form.title: Connect ElevenLabs
form.subtitle: Paste your ElevenLabs API key to start generating and cloning AI voices.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your ElevenLabs API key (xi_…) from your Profile page. Takes 30 seconds and no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Get your ElevenLabs API Key

1. Log in at [elevenlabs.io](https://elevenlabs.io).
2. Click your **Profile avatar** in the top-right corner.
3. Select **Profile** from the dropdown.
4. Scroll down to the **API Key** section.
5. Click **Copy** next to your key (it starts with `xi_`).
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- Your API key inherits the permissions of your account tier (Free, Starter, Creator, etc.).
- If you suspect the key is compromised, regenerate it from the same Profile page — the old key is immediately invalidated.
- Free-tier accounts have monthly character limits; check your usage on the **Subscription** page.
- Keep the key secret — anyone with it can consume your quota and access your cloned voices.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at elevenlabs.io → Profile → API Key. Starts with xi_.
